name: What can go wrong when I try to optimize Siri myself?
description: The main risk is changing too much at once and not knowing what fixed the problem. Make one adjustment, then test it.

mainEntity.name: What can go wrong when I try to optimize Siri myself?

acceptedAnswer.text: The biggest risk is changing too many settings at once, which makes it hard to tell what helped. Another common issue is enabling permissions without checking app-specific settings, so Siri still cannot complete the task. Make one change at a time and test it before moving on.
acceptedAnswer.description: The main risk is changing too much at once and not knowing what fixed the problem. Make one adjustment, then test it.
